{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134052775F8DB10142F0933434"}"},"total":34},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601168587681923864","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来看写的不错，视角也很新颖，希望后宫团加多点，然后开疆拓土可以用豆包生成时局图，这样能更直观，最后跪求不要烂尾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769788365,"group_id":"7593237889949912126","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你们最好看，最有才，所以能点赞吗？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2SDsx3mlyU+piioYUttL5k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b876eeffb3b740d28fbdbf5e620d4044~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620251&x-signature=6qsNDhZttsc0bN%2Bwe6uqsDFKLDA%3D","user_id":"52400037306173","user_name":"雀卡叶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52400037306173","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7593237889949912126","book_info":{"abstract":"现代社畜陈默，意外穿越到大清，成了权倾朝野的摄政王多尔衮！
别人穿越都在夺嫡争储、问鼎天下，陈默却只想搞点实在的——
把整个大清后宫，活活熬成一锅！
 
大玉儿貌美心机？那就收了！
陈园园，柳如是秦淮八艳？一个不留！
后宫妃嫔、福晋侧室、名门闺秀……
只要是陈默看上的，全都逃不出他的手掌心！
朝堂之上，他一言九鼎，压得诸王贝勒不敢抬头；
后宫之中，他风流快活，将无数佳丽尽数纳入怀中。
不装忠臣，不做傀儡，更不按历史剧本短命而亡！
手握天下权，醉卧美人膝，
这大清江山是他的，这后宫三千佳丽，也全都是他的！
且看陈默如何以摄政王之势，横扫清宫，把偌大后宫熬成独属于他的温柔乡！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9ca2f6a73003e613c6c9d11e174a3580","author":"亚宁轩","author_id":"","book_id":"7593237889949912126","book_name":"穿了：没忍住把皇嫂海兰珠拿下了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7593238429924590142","read_count":"16701","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"806788"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"248","tags":"历史古代,历史,武将,清朝,宫廷侯爵,穿越,多女主,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c08df4c046eb1c4d44fe525325051821~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255652&x-signature=TCpmN9dv3BdIg%2FqSQibkn1jegTU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52253728315","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_
